title: houstonia subviscosa
intro: Houstonia subviscosa, also known as pink Houstonia, is a rare species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae, native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Houstonia subviscosa include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and potentially exhibiting antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
